name: sliver
description: 阿里云 Sliver C2 场景，采用 ecs.c7a.large 规格，2核 4G，20G ESSD 系统盘，预置 sliver server/client、mingw 交叉编译工具与 simplehttpserver
description_en: Aliyun Sliver C2 scenario with ecs.c7a.large specification, 2 cores 4GB RAM, 20GB ESSD system disk, pre-installed sliver server/client, mingw cross-compilation tool and simplehttpserver
